content: We can hypothesize that biological pathogenic agents (from the biology definition of "agent") evolved an intrinsic curiosity-like mechanism analogous to the 2025 ICM framework for swarm UAVs, where they gain an "internal reward" for exploring novel uncolonized host tissue niches instead of only relying on external fitness signals from resource availability. This drives them to systematically explore under-occupied host spaces even when no immediate fitness gain is present, boosting their overall survival and spread.
